scripts.validate: concurrently -g --names lint,tsc,test,tofu-fmt,tofu-val-local,tofu-val-upcloud,tofu-val-persistence "pnpm lint" "pnpm check" "pnpm test" "tofu fmt -check -recursive infrastructure/" "tofu -chdir=infrastructure/envs/local validate" "tofu -chdir=infrastructure/envs/upcloud/cluster validate" "tofu -chdir=infrastructure/envs/upcloud/persistence validate"
scripts.postinstall: (tofu -chdir=infrastructure/envs/local init || true) && (tofu -chdir=infrastructure/envs/upcloud/cluster init -backend=false || true) && (tofu -chdir=infrastructure/envs/upcloud/persistence init -backend=false || true)
scripts.local:up:build: podman build -t localhost/workflow-engine:dev -f infrastructure/Dockerfile . && pnpm local:up
